entry.title: Re: All you need to know about Electronic Bank Statement - CAMT 054 format
entry.content:
Hello @29ratul ,

Could you kindly explain how the field SELVON is populated from the Payment Notes column in the bank statement? I'm particularly interested in understanding the process through which the reference number is extracted from the FEBRE-VWEZV field and then entered into FEBCL-SELVON.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: CommonCryptoLib: SNC protocol versions and cipher suites
entry.content:
@jason_ndirangu this is a parameter for the CCL. Therefore, it is not recognized by the SAP Kernel and thats why also RZ11 does not recognize it. The DEFAULT.PFL is kind of misused for the CCL parameters. This is because the DEFAULT.PFL is in control of the SAP basis admin and can be maintained in RZ10 without the need of access to the OS level. But this depends on the value of the environment variable CCL_PROFILE of the user <sid>adm.

To know which parameters are enabled for the CCL, you have to enable the CCL trace with parameter ccl/trace/level and check the header of the trace file.

entry.title: SAP CDS Access Controls in Projection Views
entry.content:
Hi community,

we have an CDS Projection View which I want to restrict using an Access Control. This does unfortunately not work, Eclipse throws an error. The Access Control works fine in the underlying root view.

I cannot find anything in the Documentation on Access Controls or Projection Views.

Does anyone know how to use AC with Projection Views?

Any input is much appreciated!

entry.title: Batch Wise Bin Location
entry.content:
Hi

  I have below query i want Bin location also

SELECT

    T1."WhsCode",

    T1."ItemCode",

       T1."BatchNum" As "Batch No.",

SUM(CASE WHEN T1."Direction" = 0 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) -

    SUM(CASE WHEN T1."Direction" = 1 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS "Quantity"

FROM IBT1 T1

LEFT JOIN OITM T2 ON T2."ItemCode" = T1."ItemCode"

GROUP BY T1."WhsCode", T1."ItemCode", T1."BatchNum"

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model - Disable Column Resizing...
entry.content:
Hi Marian,

thanks a lot for your response. This certainly is a new direction.

Unfortunately we're on 1.108 and findOn is not yet available for us.

I'll look into ways to adjust the sap.m.table by fetching it via id. I just wonder if this is much "better" than using private methods, I would expect this to be breaking easily when updating

entry.title: Re: A Deep Dive into Budget Availability Control for Cost Centers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio
entry.content:
Hi Gayathri,

If I understand your question correctly.

For project control, SAP provides a standard template for situation handling. Please refer to the help portal here. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/3045307b94084c779f82962e6c4d9f45.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2502.500 

For Cost Center, you may need to explore the extended framework.

Best,

Robert

entry.title: Re: How can I extract the reference number from the <Ustr...
entry.content:
Hi @Edrilan_Berisha ,

Thank you for the clarification!

Could you please let me know which interpretation algorithm would be responsible for extracting the reference number from the Note to Payee field? Also, how can I check this in SAP to verify the setup and its behavior?

Looking forward to your guidance!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - ID as Numeric Value, comata displayed
entry.content:
Hi Marian,

I'm afraid I cannot answer specific to your comment so I hope you'll see this.

We're implementing this via RAP, and we would like to specifiy the field as Numeric in the Root CDS VIew.

I understand that Fiori formats numeric values in this way. For our numeric IDs, we don't want to see these seperators, lets e.g. say Matnr Numbers are 100400123 and 10024564564.

Sorting these via String is not easy to understand for the user because the length is not considered. This is what UX tells me, I would say this a subject of personal preference.

I was assuming there is a simple way to get rid of the seperators. If this is not the case, I see ways to work around this (second CDS Column for sorting, or a custom FE Column).

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Quick Apply in Recruiting. Advantages and Disadvantages
entry.content:
To hire fresh graduates under the Young Talent Programme (YTP) through a bulk recruitment process using an Evergreen job requisition. However,  identified that the current job application template is quite complex, resembling the lateral hiring template, which may not be ideal for young graduates.

To improve the candidate experience, requesting a feasibility check to determine if a separate, simplified job application template can be created specifically for YTP. This new template should have fewer fields, aligned with the sample form attached, while still being linked to the job requisition in SuccessFactors. So quick apply feature is good for hiring the freshers without having multiple items to be filled ??

Any experts/leads please answer. This is really urgent requirement.

Thanks

Sudharsanan

Thanks,

entry.title: Error in Kanban while changing container to full.
entry.content:
Dear Experts, I am getting an error "REM profile is not correctly maintained for material" while changing container to full in Kanban.

I am using Discreate industry and material master is not REM relevant. Can you suggest why system is looking for REM profile in discreate industry?

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Greetings,

you need to deactivate QM for STO according to movement type. Follow SPRO path:

SPRO -> Quality Management -> Quality Inspection -> Inspection Lot Creation -> Inspection for Goods Movements

Best regards, M.

entry.title: BEHAVIOR_STATEMENT_ILLEGAL error using EML for entity I_ServiceOrderTP
entry.content:
While using RAP EML to update the startdatetime of a service order, I encountered the following ABAP runtime error: 

Help me understand why am I getting this error.

Short Text:
Statement "MODIFY ENTITIES" is not allowed with this status.

Runtime Error:
BEHAVIOR_STATEMENT_ILLEGAL

Program:
CL_IRES_RESERVATION===========CP

Application Component:
MM-IM-RS

Scenario and Code Overview:

I have developed a managed RAP application for stock transfer. Within this application, I have implemented an Action to handle stock transfer, and inside the action method of the behavior implementation class, I am invoking the API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV.

Everything works fine up to this point. However, after successfully creating the material document, there is a requirement to update the start date of the service order. To achieve this, I attempted to use EML (Entity Manipulation Language) to update the requestedservicestartdatetime field.

Unfortunately, this results in a BEHAVIOR_STATEMENT_ILLEGAL error.

Code Snippet:

Inside the action method, the public API is called to create a material document:

** Call public API for warehouse-managed scenario
public_api_post( EXPORTING is_param = ls_param
it_items = lt_items
it_srnobin = lt_srnobin
it_issueqty = lt_issueqty
it_srnoprofile = lt_srnoprofile
IMPORTING ev_get_resp_stat = DATA(lv_get_resp_stat)
ev_get_resp_text = DATA(lv_get_resp_text)
ev_post_resp_stat = DATA(lv_post_resp_stat)
ev_post_resp_text = DATA(lv_post_resp_text)
ev_exception_msg = DATA(lv_exception_msg) ).

IF lv_post_resp_stat-code = '201' OR lv_post_resp_stat-code = '200'.

** Fetch the requested service start date based on service order
SELECT SINGLE requestedservicestartdatetime FROM i_serviceordertp
WHERE serviceorder = @iv_serviceorder INTO @DATA(lv_startdate).

** Add 60 seconds (1 minute) to the start time
CALL METHOD cl_abap_tstmp=>add
EXPORTING
tstmp = lv_startdate
secs = 60
RECEIVING
r_tstmp = lv_startdate.

** Attempt to update the service order with the new start date
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_serviceordertp FORWARDING PRIVILEGED
ENTITY serviceorder
UPDATE FIELDS ( requestedservicestartdatetime )
WITH VALUE #( ( serviceorder = iv_serviceorder
requestedservicestartdatetime = lv_startdate
* %control = VALUE #( requestedservicestartdatetime = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed )
) )
FAILED DATA(lt_failed_modify)
MAPPED DATA(lt_mapped_modify)
REPORTED DATA(lt_reported_modify).

ENDIF.

 

Runtime Error Details:

The ABAP program "CL_IRES_RESERVATION===========CP" terminated due to an invalid statement execution.

Error Analysis:

  • The statement "MODIFY ENTITIES" is only permitted in specific phases of RAP behavior execution.
  • The execution is currently in the "SAVE" phase, where modifying data using MODIFY ENTITIES is not allowed.
  • The error message confirms that EML statements like "MODIFY ENTITY" and "COMMIT ENTITY" are not permitted in certain contexts, including:
    • UPDATE TASK processing
    • PERFORM ON COMMIT
    • PERFORM ON ROLLBACK
    • Event handlers for COMMIT WORK and ROLLBACK WORK

      Termination Point:

      • Program: CL_IRES_RESERVATION===========CP
      • Include: CL_IRES_RESERVATION===========CM00K
      • Line Number: 15

entry.title: Re: Create/Restore Postgres DB Backup
entry.content:

that is exactly what i tried. But i get this error:
Job (<id>) failed: provision could not be completed: Service broker error: Service broker backing-services-broker-postgresql-db-cf-eu10-004 failed with: provisioning of instance <id> and plan <id> failed, cause: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'SnapshotCreateTime')

Regards, Heinrich

Now I want to print PO number on challan PDF output. If anyone have faced same issue, and if yes how do you get mapping of PO number with challan number in S/4HANA public cloud. Also please help me with respective CDS views and fields to link PO with challan.

Anaïs

entry.title: Re: Which interpretation algorithm is used to extract the...
entry.content:
You can find list/explanation of algorithms in

  • Online help, such as Interpretation Algorithms 
  • OSS notes, such as 114713 - New interpretation algorithms as of Rel. 3.0F

Look at Customizing transactions OT83, option 'Create transaction type' and 'Assign External transaction types to posting rules.'

entry.title: Re: sap gui gesperrt nach mehreren Fehlversuchen sich anzumelden
entry.content:
Hallo,

welcher User in welchem Mandant ist gesperrt?

In der Developer edition gibt es 4 User in Mandant 001, mit denen man sich anmelden kann, davon 2 mit Entwicklerrechten. Wenn mit einem davon noch eine Anmeldung möglich ist, schafft ein kleiner ABAP-Report Abhilfe. 

report Z_UNLOCK.
update usr02 client specified
    set LOCNT = 0
    where MANDT = '000' and ( BNAME = 'SAP*' ).
commit work.

Wenn beide Entwicklungsuser in Mandant 001 gesperrt sind, kann man noch auf DB-Ebene das Feld in USR02 auf 0 setzen, z.B. über isql. 

Viele Grüße

Jan

entry.title: Re: Does SAC have a Rank function?
entry.content: Yogeshwar, I did not understand how the rank columns can be created in the model. could you please explain. There is no rank function at the model level to my knowledge.

entry.title: Re: Legacy data transfer and Make company code settings -...
entry.content:
Hi,
I guess the 5 period depreciation amount difference is coming from the fact that you take over the values from your ECC system with date 12/31/2024. While the last day of FY in your ECC is 07/31/2024. So, to match the year end dates between the ECC and Cloud, it would be 07/31/2024 (own FYV) = 12/31/2024 (K4 FYV).
If you take 12/31/2024 from your ECC it will already include the 5 periods from FY 2025 and uploading those values to Cloud will end up messing up the values.

How I would do it, get the amounts from your ECC system with date 07/31/2024, those are the Cumulative values. And all the postings afterwards are current year values, they should go under Posted values. Starting from 01/08/2024 until the actual legacy transfer date: 30/04/2025.

The initial idea to overwrite the last day of closed FY is not possible. Those dates are coming from the FYV settings. Any FYV that's not the same as your ECC settings will behave differently.

entry.title: DM Deprecated Services in Production Processes
entry.content:
Hi experts,

does anyone know what happens with services in Digital Manufacturing when they are deprecated?

Will a production process in which such a service is used continue to work even if the service is not synchronized/updated? Or will deprecated services be deleted at some point and the production process will no longer work without adaptation?

Thank you for your answer!

entry.title: Re: I want to batch update bank groups in the bank master.
entry.content:
You can use the Bank Master Data Cockpit, available via the button on your screenshot, as follows:

1. Apply the SAP Note 3517136 in your private cloud system. When you are running a public cloud system, you need to wait till 2508 (August 2025) to get this enhancement available in your system.
2. Export bank master records to a file, using the new built-in export function in Cockpit
3. Edit the file (e.g. in excel), adding the bank group values in the dedicated records
4. Import the file using the new format BNK (SAP Bank Master Data)

A solution via BIC2S is not possible, as the available formats do not work with the Bank Group field.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps: Inline Frame remove sandbox attribute
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski,

I simply used this "zero configuration" http-server: https://github.com/http-party/http-server which is running by nodejs. 

For example my configuration looks like that:

 

cd C:\Users\<user>\Desktop\<folder>
http-server -p 8080 --cors

 

You can also add Basic Authentication.

This will simply start the server locally on port 8080 with CORS enabled (CORS is important, otherwise the PDF is not loaded). You get access to all files located in the folder.

In my case I have added an html file, which is loaded in the iframe on SAP Build Apps. With that it is easier to test and debug, as no you don't need to copy paste the complete file in the small value field.

entry.title: Re: Analytic Model was created with older version of the...
entry.content: All, we are sorry to hear about the disruption caused by the latest release of the Analytic Model editor. We have identified the issue and are in the last steps of fixing it. In case of need, pls open a ticket and refer back to this post in it. We'll keep you posted on the exact timeline for releasing the fix. Br, Jan Fetzer (Product Management SAP Datasphere Modelling)

entry.title: When transferring CTS, unwanted import or error occurred frequently due to dependency
entry.content:
When transferring CTS, unwanted import or error occurred frequently due to dependency.
I'd like to check the reason why the dependency occurs or the case that can occur, but I'm inquiring because I can't find the related document.

I can just release the dependency and import it, but I need to see why the dependency occurs in the first place.

Is there a document that can check the contents? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: When transferring CTS, unwanted import or error occur...
entry.content:
Hello Cheon Hyojeong,

Object dependency checks are executed during export. Dependencies of objects that can be detected by the system are analyzed.

For more info, Kindly refer the below help doc

Transport Dependencies | SAP Help Portal

Transport Dependencies | SAP Help Portal --> Object Dependencies

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: API Anomaly Detection in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any news when this feature will be available in standard service plans.  Since now it is only available in premium service plans?

Kr,

Jan

entry.title: Request for Solution – Assigning Assets to Employees in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I am implementing FI-AA for a client based in Dubai on SAP Public Cloud. As part of their requirement, they need to assign assets to employees and track which asset is assigned to which employee.

In SAP Private Cloud, this is typically achieved using the "Personnel number" field in the asset master data. However, in SAP Public Cloud, we could not find a similar field to maintain the employee assignment at the asset master level.

Could you please advise on the standard approach or any available alternative solution in SAP Public Cloud to fulfill this requirement?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,
Syed Ahsan

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors People Analytics (Stories): How to create change report (current vs previous valu
entry.content:
How to transport the data model from test to production?, if I care about the report but not the data model, do we have to replicate it manually?
Thank you

entry.title: Re: Unsupported OData version 4.01
entry.content:
Hi @UweFetzer_se38 ,

there are several options. As the ODataModel is part of OpenUI5, you may raise an issue in https://github.com/SAP/openui5/issues.

The alternative is influence.sap.com where SAPUI5 requests are typically raised in https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2279 and sometimes in https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2538. 

Please note

  • We have the requirement to support scale="floating" for Edm.Decimal internally already. This would include to accept 4.01 metadata. However, so far the priority was not sufficient to actually work on it.
  • OData 4.01 is a very broad topic, that we may never fully achieve. Similarly, we do not support everything possible with OData 4.0 so far. Specific parts of 4.01 are achievable though.

 

Best regards
Mathias.

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request fai...
entry.content:
Hello,

I had the same problem and was able to get rid of the 401 error by adding “username” and “password” properties to the “systems.json” file (located here: %USERPROFILE%\.fioritools\systems.json)

I hope this helps,

Aymeric

EX MMNR: 

EX: input in scanning:

 

 

result:

I just posted an answer for the same issue here :
VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Adjustment of ML indicator in Material Master is not possible.
entry.content:
Need the ability to adjust the “ML indicator" (Material Ledger Activated at Material Level) for some materials in the material master in the Accounting 1 view. This is not possible via the “Change material” app, as the field is grayed out. This is also not possible via Mass Maintenance for Products because this field is not available in the scope.

How can this indicator be subsequently ticked?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Adjustment of ML indicator in Material Master is not...
entry.content:
To activate the Material Ledger (ML) you need to:

  1. Access your CBC System or Manage Your Solution and go to SSCUI / Configuration Activity 103539 - Define Attributes of Material Types.
  2. Select the relevant Material Type and double-click "Quantity/value updating" in the left tree.
  3. Check the relevant Valuation area and verify whether the indicators "Quantity updating" and "Value updating" are set.

If a material is created without setting the "Quantity Updating" and "Value Updating" fields in ML, and you attempt to activate these fields afterward, the material master will not be updated for the existing materials. However, any newly created material will have ML activated.

It's generally recommend that you change the value and/or quantity (ML) update for new material types only. Changes on customizing for material type can cause inconsistencies.

For more info on this please follow KBA: 3311219 ( https://me.sap.com/notes/0003311219  )

entry.title: How can restrict user responsible access in quality notification
How to Grey Out an Attribute or Attribute Value in SAP CPQ?
entry.content:
Hi SAP CPQ experts,

I am working on a configuration in SAP CPQ where selecting one option should disable another option by greying it out instead of making it disappear. Additionally, an infobox should provide an explanation for why the option is disabled.

So far, I have successfully configured a Disallow Attribute Dependency Rule and added an infobox to display additional information. However, I haven't found a feature that allows me to visually modify the appearance of a field (e.g., changing its color) or making it visible but not editable based on conditions.

The use case:

  • The end user selects an attribute value in a quote.
  • Another attribute (or attribute value) should then be greyed out (disabled) but remain visible, along with an explanation in an infobox.

Is there a standard way to achieve this in SAP CPQ? Or would this require customization?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Denis Gönc

entry.title: Re: EWM Layout-Oriented Storage Control (LOSC) – A simple guide
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this great content!

entry.title: Re: Cannot use alternate BOM 1
entry.content:
Hi @VickiG1 

 

It could due to the Bom Usage involved . There is standard delivered customizing in 

Define Order of Priority for BOM Usages but maybe for the production version involved a usage is selected that  doesnt have an entry in Define Order of Priority for BOM Usages

 

Unfortunately its not mention what usage you are using but its the only thing i can think of 

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Block postings of WBS-Elements in Concur
entry.content:
Want to know if there is a way in blocking finalized WBS-Elements from being displayed in Concur.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Block postings of WBS-Elements in Concur
entry.content:
You can manage cost postings on work packages by blocking or allowing the following functions: 

  • Time Recording
  • Activity Allocation 
  • Concur Expense Posting
  • Other Expense Posting
  • Purchasing

 

Please refer to the SAP HELP documentation for the same

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/29cf986299714386847f4d4c9bb86994/b17342af91d74c58b7b2afc74d6b3dd5.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2502.500#manage-cost-postings

I have tried to find how many maximum line item we can have in accounting document but could find anything specifically for public cloud. There is 6 digit in line item like 000001 but note sure if 6 digit is the correct answer.

Kristina

entry.title: Re: ABAP & Google API's(drive)
entry.content:
You can explore ABAP SDK for Google Cloud 

It has all the clients to connect to various Google Workspace APIs.

You can check this blog as well, which uses Drive API to list files from Google Drive: Blog Link

entry.title: How to configure external number range for particular billing type while posting Invoice
Re: How can I extract the reference number from the <Ustr...
entry.content:
Hi nejla, you're welcome.

 

So my proposal would be to try the 021 algorithm or the 421 (which is even a bit more resilient). But there could be also a bit more "false positives" with 421. So it really depends on how well aligned you run your business with your clients. Do they follow your "rules" and they simply add the reference document number without any special characters etc.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Vue UI5 webcomponents binding
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am starting with UI5 webcomponents. I choosed VUE framework.

Now t want to bind my model to a tree.

I recycled the example for binding from https://github.com/SAP-samples/ui5-webcomponents-data-binding-example

Instead a table I want to bin da treeitem.

The items are dispalyed, but the "name" is not replaced.


Any idea?
Jens

 

<ui5-tree v-for="product in supermarket.products">

                <ui5-tree-item expanded text="{{ product.name }}" icon="paste" selected> </ui5-tree-item>

</ui5-tree>

Anyone found any solution? Can´t see any relevant notes ither.

entry.title: Re: EWM Layout-Oriented Storage Control (LOSC) – A simple guide
entry.content:
Hi,

it is incredible, but that really works. I can tell you one thing, this is NOT how LOSC is supposed to work, but with these strange settings, you do get the results you showed. 

Biggest issue still is that you cannot do a quality inspection, as the goods move on immediately (after arriving in your storage type 0030). 

Brgds

Juergen

---

All the above is no official SAP statement.

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

SPRO path: SPRO -> Quality Management -> Quality Inspection -> Inspection Lot Creation -> Inspection for Goods Movements is not evaluated on an EWM managed storage location of you work with inbound deliveries. See also customer influence request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/320456

Best regards, Matthias

entry.title: Re: Accessing MIGO Through Fiori Launchpad on Mobile Device
entry.content:
@Tamas

I can access the "Post Goods Movement" app that launches the MIGO transaction on a desktop, but I can't access that same app from the launchpad when working on a tablet/phone.

Ideally, I should be able to create an adaptive flavor for a specific device type and then assign that flavor to a custom Fiori tile in the launchpad if needed. Is the public cloud flexible enough that I can create a custom tile and have it navigate directly to an adaptive flavor?

entry.title: what report gives the lots in QI inspection including the receiving date?
entry.content: Is there any report that list the material  lots in QI and include the receiving date ?

entry.title: Time Recording Validation Rule - Record Break
entry.content:
I have a requirement to ensure a user records a 30-minute break if worked 8.5 hours and a 1-hour break if worked 9 hours.  The break should be recorded in the 5th hour.  Is it possible to create a validation rule that looks at hours worked and checks to see if a break was added. 

Attached is the business rule I have attempted to configure but is not working as expected.

 
 

Thank You

entry.title: Is there a way to put an editor lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants?
entry.content: Is there a way to put a lock to ATC Check variant in ATC -> Manage Variants so that no one tampers the variant configuration?

entry.title: Re: Pop Up Message When Job Requisition was Created
entry.content:
Hi All,

We would also like to achieve same thing. Does anyone have solution/any other ideas for this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Router (seclogin: Can't add credentials)
entry.content: You don't need to add credentials to the same user that is the owner off the PSE file, just to a different one.

entry.title: Set onbordee person type fields to non mandatory just for onboardee only leave field mandatory in EC
entry.content:
Dear Support,

 

I am trying to set a field in the personalinfo_onboardee persontype in BCUI so it is set to non mandatory for the onboardee but leave the HRIS element field as mandatory for the EC field

The error message received: ONBOARDEE Data Model is not consistent: The field gender should be enabled and mandatory in personalInfo_onboardee, as this field in personalInfo is enabled and mandatory.

I referred to the KBA 3194123 - Onboardee person type functionality in employmentInfo HRIS Entity - Onboarding  but cannot create the business rule to

entry.title: SAP Build Code application deployment error
entry.content:
Dear Community members,

I am trying to deploy application in build code and to see it in Work zone, can i get help to understand the below error on why my deployment is getting failed, i have signed in to my cloud foundry account as well

Appretiate your support

entry.title: Re: Unsupported OData version 4.01
entry.content:
Hi @Mathias_Uhlmann,

"influence" is a good idea, will do.

On the other hand maybe it will be enough to get rid of the "Version 4.01 not supported" even if not all functions are supported (yet). 

Uwe

entry.title: SuccessFactors Mashup Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) to SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll (ECP) setup for Canada payroll. When we try to save changes in Tax/Garnishment infotypes from EC to ECP using the standard mashup screen in EC, the system displays an error message '500 Internal Server Error. A request for server was sent to server'. See attached error message description.

We reviewed the resolution under SAP note 2887555, but there is no '#same-site-by-default-cookies' option available to review and disable in chrome and microsoft edge browsers.

Has anyone encountered this issue in the past or currently using mashups without any issues?

Thanks,

Mitesh

entry.title: Data Management: Managing Analytical Privileges, Fix Selections and Data Slice Locking
entry.content:
In a previous blog post, The New Data Management Screen, we showed you the newest enhancements in the SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM  Cloud SM) application for better user experience regarding the new Data Management screen, focused on the Model Table function perspective.

In this blog post we will highlight the enhancements featuring Editable Query function and maximizing its potential when applying Object Based Authorizations, such as Analytical Privileges, Fix Selections and Data Slice Locking.

 

Upload and Edit in Editable Query when Analytical Privileges are Applied

In the blog post SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud: Analytical Privileges, we explored a significant feature known as Analytical Privileges. This feature, part of the Object-Based Authorization in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model, enables specific users to have Read and Write access to Master Data. Users granted with Read Access can view the Master Data, while those with Write Access can modify the data records associated with it in the Input/Output Activity (Editable Query).

In this blog post, we will demonstrate how to utilize the new Data Management screen for uploading data when Analytical Privileges are set.

Prerequisites:

  • Create teams with designated users.
  • Establish a characteristic field with master data values.
  • Assign teams Read and Write Access to the relevant master data values, as illustrated in the example below. 

SCENARIO 1- Upload without erroneous data

Previously, in New Data Management Screen blog post, we introduced this revamped screen, highlighting its fresh user interface and exciting new features. One of the standout improvements is the streamlined file upload process.

Now, when users upload a file (csv or xlsx) in the Data Management screen, where Analytical Privileges are applied in an Editable Query on the Modeling screen, the users can take advantage of a convenient Drag and Drop interface.

In this scenario, a user in TEAM 1 team will upload a file in an Editable Query, with the upload restricted to values where the user has both Read and Write Access (all the values in Hierarchy Name H1), as well as the values that do not have Read nor Write Access.

Additionally, there are two specific cases where the user has Read Access, but lacks Write Access: CHMD1-TEAM 2 and CHMD6-TEAM 1. This will allow the user to see the data, however, the user will not be able to edit it.

Users can easily monitor their uploads through log messages in the footer and in the logs of Application Monitor screen (only accessible for users with APPLICATION_MONITOR READ and SYSTEM_USER_ALL roles). These provide clear feedback, indicating how many rows were automatically skipped due to non-compliance with the current Analytical Privileges. This means that only (Total – X) rows will be successfully imported, while the X rows that were skipped are those that the user do not have Read/Write Access to it.

The user in TEAM 1 can successfully upload 9 rows and will skip 3 rows (CHMD6, CHDM7 and CHMD8 since these values are assigned to TEAM 2).

However, if a user from TEAM 2 accesses the same Editable Query, the displayed data will differ because of the Analytical Privileges assigned to each user. This not only applies to the original data already included in the Editable Query (highlighted in green in the image below), but as well to the newly uploaded values (highlighted in yellow). This means that from the 9 rows uploaded from user in TEAM 1, user in TEAM 2 will only see 6 (the ones allowed due to the set Analytical Privileges).

Spoiler
If a user assigned in TEAM 2 team tries to edit value CHMD1, this will never be possible. The user has Read Access to this value although they don’t have Write Access to edit that value, or to edit other value into CHMD1.

SCENARIO 2- Upload with “Overwrite the existing data” checked

When importing data into an Editable Query with Analytical Privileges applied to a Master Data value, only the data for which the user has the appropriate Analytical Privileges will be modified when using the Overwrite Upload option. This also applies to the overwrite of data in the input Model Table.

The user in TEAM 1, upon uploading in the Editable Query, can see in the log messages that 3 rows were automatically skipped, and 9 rows were successfully uploaded. The values CHMD7 and CHMD8 are not present in the Editable Query because the user in TEAM 1 does not have Read Access for those. And although the user can still see CHMD6 (due to their Read Access), this value is not present from the performed upload (since the user lacks Write Access to perform this action), but instead this value persists from the original data which was not overwritten.

Moreover, the upload overwritten in the Editable Query also takes effect in input Model Table. This means, that if a user in the TEAM 1 does not have Read nor Write Accesses to CHMD7 or CHMD8 and although has Read Access to CHMD6 but lacks Write Access for it, the upload Overwrite option in Editable Query will not remove these values in input Model Table (values highlighted in red in the example below).

 

Upload when Fix Selection is Applied in Editable Query

The fix selection allows to filter the Query output, and the data is displayed based on the values defined in the selection. This action can be configured for all Characteristic type fields in the Query Element. To know more about Fix Selection in Query Element kindly check the Help Portal.

After the fix selection is defined, the Editable Query function can be further used in the Process Template and Process Instance in the Input/Output Activity.

SCENARIO 1- Upload without erroneous data

After defining the fix selections in the Query Element, save and activate the changes, then click on the Data Management icon in the header and confirm the Query output. In the Data Management screen, click on the Upload button under the header Upload & Download, and after selecting the correct formats in the Data Upload window, click on Confirm.

The upload will be successful and the rows that are not compliant with the fix selections applied will be automatically skipped - the only ones to be uploaded are the ones compliant with the applied Fix Selections.

 

Spoiler
If uploading data to an Editable Query function and there is Fix Selection maintained in its Query Elements, only the data associated to the Fix Selection would be replaced when uploading using Overwrite option SAP PaPM Cloud: What's New as of 2022-09-26?

SCENARIO 2 - Upload a file where all rows are skipped

But what happens when a user tries to upload a file where all the rows will be skipped, since they are not compliant with the applied fix selections?

This scenario is not allowed, and therefore an error message will be displayed stating that no rows were inserted as well as the number of rows skipped during the upload.

 

Upload without and with erroneous data in Editable Query when Data Slice Locking is applied

In the blog post titled SAP PaPM Cloud: What’s New as of 2022-12-19?, we discussed an important feature where users can lock and unlock data slices based on specific combinations of Process Selection characteristic field values within the underlying Model Tables. This functionality is part of the Editable Query feature used in the Input/Output Activity on the Process Management screen.

If you're looking to utilize this capability, simply follow the steps outlined below:

On the Process Management screen:

  • Select the values under the process selections.
  • Save the changes.
  • Select the process main task and lock the selected values. 

I will show you now different scenarios where the data slice locking can be applied when uploading data.

SCENARIO 1: Upload a file without erroneous data

Simply drag and drop your file into the designated area on the selected Input/Output Activity. Select the appropriate Number, Date, and Time Formats (according to the file to be uploaded) and field delimiter (in case of a csv file), and watch as the upload begins and finishes seamlessly.  The number of rows that were successfully uploaded and the ones that were skipped because they are not compliant with the data slice locking applied can be visualized in the log messages footer.

Spoiler
If you are importing/uploading files to an Input/Output Activity, with the “Overwrite” option selected and Data Slice Locking is maintained in the Process Instance properties, the data associated with the Data Slice Locking will not be replaced.

Upon upload, the data will be updated accordingly in the corresponding Editable Query used in the Input/Output Activity on the Modeling screen, as well as the input Model Table.

SCENARIO 2: Upload a file with erroneous data

If the user uploads a file with erroneous values, the Upload Preview screen will be triggered and here you can make necessary edits. After correcting the data, the user can proceed with finalizing the data upload.

 

In this case, two processes for skipping rows during upload due to Data Slice Lock can be implemented:

A- Automatic Skipping: Rows without erroneous data that are automatically skipped if their values do not comply with the current Data Slice Lock.

B- Upload Preview Skipping: Rows containing erroneous data can be edited in the Upload Preview screen and if they do not align with the applied Data Slice Lock, they will be also skipped.

Note: For this scenario, the user can only track these actions and any relevant messages that provides a clear visibility into the upload process, in the Application Monitor's Message Logs in Application Monitor screen as shown below.

  1. The first highlighted sequence displayed in the picture above, illustrates a scenario where the Upload Preview screen is triggered due to erroneous data that requires editing before the upload can be completed. Notably, a warning message appears indicating that two rows were skipped. These rows were not flagged for erroneous data; rather, they were excluded because they did not comply with the current data slice lock. As a result, these two rows were not included in the Upload Preview.
  2. The second highlighted sequence another warning message is displayed. This time, it informs the user that one uploaded row was skipped due to non-compliance with the current data slice lock. This issue arose when the user edited a value that conflicted with the established compliance rules. Consequently, this row was also omitted from the upload process, resulting in a successful upload of only 5 rows.
Spoiler
When user is trying to download the data where Data Slice Locking is applied, the option “Complete data set” download can be used with or without applying formatting, and the user will be able to see the differences related with the filters applied.

And this is it. Hope that you enjoyed reading our blog post. Stay tuned for more updates and if you like to read previous blog post kindly visit the tag PaPMCloudSM.

entry.title: Re: Can anyone explain how to maintain flexible replenish...

entry.title: Re: Issue with Legal Entity Transfer for New Employment -...
entry.content: Yup.... confirmed - for us as well that was the root cause of the issue --. what's more, I noticed it has to be a private phone since the Business phone doesn't end up in the Recrutiment on the candidate profile.

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP on premise system with Google Drive so th...
entry.content:
@MadhavSharma ....you can use ABAP SDK for Google Cloud to invoke any Google APIs natively from ABAP using HTTP, including Drive API. ABAP class /GOOG/CL_DRIVE_V3 method EXPORT_FILES in the SDK let's you get file contents of a file stored on Google Drive.

Prerequisites to this is installation and configuration (SAP Security, SDK Config) of the ABAP SDK for Google Cloud. You can use OAuth 2.0 based authentication option in the SDK to invoke Drive API (detailed steps with examples in the blog article linked at last).

Here is a code snippet....EXPORT_FILES method returns the file contents in xstring format....which you can convert to readable string using SAP standard function modules.

 

DATA:
  lv_q_mimetype TYPE string,
  lv_p_file_id  TYPE string,
  lv_filedata TYPE xstring.

TRY.
* Open HTTP Connection
    DATA(lo_client) = NEW /goog/cl_drive_v3( iv_key_name = '<ABAP SDK Client Key>' ).

* Populate relevant parameters
    lv_q_mimetype = '<Mime Type of the File>'.
    lv_p_file_id = '<File ID of the file>'.

* Call API method: drive.files.export
    CALL METHOD lo_client->export_files
      EXPORTING
        iv_q_mimetype = lv_q_mimetype
        iv_p_file_id  = lv_p_file_id
      IMPORTING
        es_raw        = lv_filedata
        ev_ret_code   = DATA(lv_ret_code)
        ev_err_text   = DATA(lv_err_text)
        es_err_resp   = DATA(ls_err_resp).
    IF lo_client->is_success( lv_ret_code ).
      MESSAGE 'Success' TYPE 'S'.
* Convert lv_filedata (in xstring) to string to get file data
    ELSE.
      MESSAGE lv_err_text TYPE 'E'.
    ENDIF.

* Close HTTP Connection
    lo_client->close( ).

  CATCH /goog/cx_sdk INTO DATA(lo_exception).
    MESSAGE lo_exception->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
ENDTRY.

 

ABAP SDK let's you invoke other Workspace APIs too, like Gmail, Sheets, Chat, etc., refer to the blog article here to know more.

entry.title: Re: Account Information not recognized: Active Directory...
entry.content: Check the AD service account that you are using to see if it is set for constrained delegation.  I suspect that it is not, and that is the cause of your problem.

entry.title: Understanding DIV and MOD in ABAP and beyond
entry.content:
Many developers are confused about DIV and MOD in

- ABAP
- ABAP SQL
- CL_ABAP_BIGINT
- Other programming languages

This blog post tries to clarify the confusion. 

1. DIV and MOD in ABAP

The definition of DIV and MOD comes from the following mathematical theorem:

Division Theorem: For all integers 𝑎,𝑏 with 𝑏≠0, there are uniquely determined integers 𝑞,𝑟 such that

𝑎=𝑞𝑏+𝑟 and 0≤𝑟<|𝑏|.
 
This is normally proved in an introductory course in linear algebra or elementary number theory in the first semester of a technical-oriented major.

Remembering the theorem, one defines: a DIV b := q and a MOD b := r.
 
By definition: (a MOD b) is always positive. This makes sense, as it is the residue class in Z/ |b| Z and one normally takes 0, 1, 2, ..., |b| - 1 as representatives of the residue classes of this ring.
 
Example: If you did not study mathematics, this is just how we calculate with times, i.e., 11 + 2 = 1. Mathematically this would be the ring Z/ 12 Z with representatives 0, ..., 11 o'clock. No one speaks about -2 o'clock, so it makes total sense that MOD is positive. 
 
Conclusion: So we get the following behaviour:
aba DIV ba MOD bWhy?
73217 = 2 * 3 + 1
7-3-217 = (-2)*(-3) + 1
-73-32-7 = (-3)*3 + 2
-7-332-7 = 3 * (-3) + 2

This is exactly how ABAP is calculating. This is also how any reasonable mathematician would do it.

2. DIV and MOD in ABAP SQL and other programming languages

The behavior of ABAP is different from HANA. It is also different from C/C++ and other programming languages. The reason is just performance. For performance reasons, the CPU does not define "real" DIV/MOD operations but instead a different concept of QUOTIENT and REMAINDER, where the quotient is just the "truncated" (i.e. rounded towards zero) value of a / b and "MOD" := "%" is adjusted such that still:

a = (a / b ) * b + (a % b)

To not confuse these different concepts, one should use the symbols "/" and "%" for this quotient/remainder arithmetic.

This automatically yields negative MOD values, which is not as consistent as the ABAP behavior but is just a few CPU cycles faster, as we spare an additional comparison and addition at the end of the calculation. 

For ABAP SQL we decided to adopt the HANA behavior, as the SQL statement is more or less passed without changes to the HANA DB. So we have:

aba "DIV" b := a / ba "MOD" b := a % bWhy?
73217 = 2 * 3 + 1
7-3-217 = (-2)*(-3) + 1
-73-2-1-7 = (-2)*3 - 1
-7-32-1-7 = 2 * (-3) - 1

For many reasons, it was decided to implement "/" and "%" as functions and not as operators. As functions need a real function name, the confusing names DIV and MOD have been used in ABAP SQL, which leads to the impression that the function DIV should behave as the ABAP operator DIV and the function MOD should behave as the ABAP operator MOD. 

3. Behavior of CL_ABAP_BIGINT

Since a few releases, arbitrary precision integers in ABAP have been available, which can theoretically be calculated with millions of digits. These are implemented using an object-oriented ABAP class, CL_ABAP_BIGINT, which also defines many number-theoretic functions, including methods DIV, DIV_INT4, MOD and MOD_INT4, besides others.

The behavior of CL_ABAP_BIGINT is not completely obvious either but it has some inherent logic. There are two sets of methods:

  1. DIV, DIV_INT4
  2. MOD, MOD_INT4
  • The methods DIV and DIV_INT4 yield pairs (p,q) with the same semantics as HANA, C/C++, and the CPU. This is again for performance reasons. 
  • The MOD method defines a real modulo operation like ABAP. This method yields positive values only and does not belong to the DIV or DIV_INT4 method, so these two sets of methods are actually unrelated. This can be directly seen, because DIV( ) already returns pairs (p,q) of quotient and remainder. The MOD methods are unrelated. 

So one could say, that MOD calculates MOD, but DIV calculates the pair ("/", "%") and not DIV. Symbolic method names are not possible in ABAP though 😉.

4. Conclusion

I hope this post clarifies the most common confusion about DIV and MOD in ABAP and explains why the ABAP operators, ABAP SQL, and CL_ABAP_BIGINT made different design choices.

entry.title: API_PRODUCT_SRV not creating the Purchasing View
entry.content:
Good Day,

I am using the API_PRODUCT_SRV TO create a material in the backend everything creates fine but the Purchasing View is not available.

Please is my sample Payload

{
    "Product": "test123",
    "ProductType": "FERT",
    "ProductGroup": "NP000000",
    "IndustrySector": "M",
    "BaseUnit": "EA",
    "ProductManufacturerNumber": "140170050104A",
    "ManufacturerNumber": "18023127",
    "SizeOrDimensionText": "XTR64P8",
    "to_Plant": [
        {
            "Product": "test123",
            "Plant": "010",
            "ProcurementType": "F",
            "MaintenanceStatusName": "DE",
            "PurchasingGroup": "",
            "MRPType": "ND"
        },
        {
            "Product": "test123",
            "Plant": "040",
            "ProcurementType": "F",
            "MaintenanceStatusName": "DE",
            "MRPType": "ND",
            "PurchasingGroup": "",
            "to_ProductPlantProcurement": {
                "Product": "test123",
                "Plant": "040"
            }
        }
    ],
    "to_ProductBasicText": [
        {
            "Product": "test123",
            "Language": "DE",
            "LongText": "test123"
        },
        {
            "Product": "test123",
            "Language": "EN",
            "LongText": "test123"
        }
    ],
    "to_Description": [
        {
            "Product": "test123",
            "Language": "DE",
            "ProductDescription": "test123"
        },
        {
            "Product": "test123",
            "Language": "EN",
            "ProductDescription": "test123"
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Bamberg 02/2025

Termin:

Do, 27.02 ab 18:30Uhr (gerne auch später hinzukommen)

Location:

Restaurante Azzurro (Zeppelinstraße 18, 96052 Bamberg)


Vergesst nicht bei unserer Gruppe vorbeizuschauen

entry.title: Re: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hello 

When using SAML mappings you don't need to worry about attributes in IAS for the users, all the mapping happens in the SAML assertion and SAC will receive all the details needed. This is the same scenario as most companies use for BTP apps.

In the scenario described in the learning mentioned earlier you should use IAS as a proxy an you should already have EntraID configured in IAS as a corporate IDP in section Identity providers->Corporate identity providers. The trust config IAS-EntraID should consider attributes like these:

if a user have multiple groups those will be included in the SAML assertion. you don´t need to worry about it. You should use a naming though to avoid sending all EntraID groups to IAS and exceed the limit of 150 in SAML.

From IAS side you need to configure a new app for SAC and configure SAML in SAC with this app. This app should include custom1, custom2 atributes (depending if you want groups and teams in different atributes)

A user in EntraID having assigned sac_admin, Sac_team1,Sac_role2 will log into SAC and will have in the SAML assertion the value of the groups in the attributes custom1 and custom2 (usually groupIDs are used instead of group names). then you map those group IDs to your roles/Teams in SAC as described in the learning and the users will be automatically created and assigned to groups in SAC once login. There's no IPS needed neither attribute creation in IAS. it's just a SAML mapping between EntraID-IAS-SAC

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration: Web Services Security UsernameToken
entry.content:
Hi asutoshmaharana2326,

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE 16.0 redhat 9 raw device
entry.content:
Well, even though raw device are not supported anymore, character device are still a thing and will be for as long as there will hard drive!

If Oracle can work with character devices without the use of /dev/raw, I'm sure SAP can do the same!  ... that bein said, if SAP ASE is still a thing!

entry.title: SAP COLLECTIONS MANAGEMENT INITIAL DATA TRANSFER FROM AR to collection worklist.
entry.content:
SAP COLLECTIONS MANAGEMENT INITIAL DATA TRANSFER FROM AR to collection worklist.

We are in the process of extending collections management to some of our other jurisdictions. In cloud we have a confusion that how we can transfer existing customer line items (Initial data transfer) from AR to collections management so that the items are visible in collection worklists.

In SAP ECC we used to have a program (FDM_COLL_SEND_ITEMS ) to run and it transfers all data from AR to collections. Can we please have a confirmation on how to do the same in SAP public cloud . Do we schedule a job ? if yes than what is the job name ? as i have checked in collection management jobs and could not find any relevant job. Can this be confirmed asap as we will have our  Go live that is due soon on hold because of this. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP COLLECTIONS MANAGEMENT INITIAL DATA TRANSFER FROM...
entry.content: Refer SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3570510

entry.title: Re: System Variables in SAC
entry.content: @vinayakgole We also have same requirement. Pls share solution if you achieved it.

entry.title: Re: Client has status not modifiable - SCC4
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

It is highly not recommended to directly change such things on Production system. I am not sure if you belong to Basis functional area or else it is more surprising that you have direct Client Administration rights. In urgent cases always Involve your Basis team and do it with Proper approvals, once the DEV and Quality is up and running, follow the defined Transport process again to make all the systems synchronized and for reporting purposes.

Note: If the defined TR processes are not followed then major issues can occur at the time of system Audit

Regards

Amit

entry.title: Re: Row Level Security in SAC
entry.content: We got this result before, but we have multiple stories and each story has multiple models, and this is a huge effort to give access for each model to users. Is there any way to group the users to give the access at once or to group the models? All we need is to simplify the process as much as possible

entry.title: Using a Single App Router for Multiple CAP Services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I hope you are all doing well.

I am currently working on a project where I need to configure a single App Router to handle multiple CAP (Cloud Application Programming) services. While I have successfully managed to use a single App Router for multiple SAPUI5 front-end applications, I am struggling to extend this approach to multiple CAP services.

Despite my research and experimentation, I have not yet found a clear or effective way to achieve this. I would greatly appreciate any guidance, recommendations, or best practices you might have on this matter.

Has anyone here managed to configure an App Router to seamlessly route requests to different CAP services within the same deployment? If so, I would be grateful for any insights or examples you could share.

Many thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Error message F5A 49 / Item xxx must be corrected in FB60
entry.content: Hi, i was getting the same error while doing fb60. sol - double click on "tds/tax payable gl" enter the text and save
